title: The Final Message 🏁
description: Your journey from beginner to defender.

slides.title: Congratulations! 🏆
slides.content:
### You've Made It!

You've traveled through the world of Networking, Linux, Firewalls, Cryptography, and Social Engineering. 

You now have the 'Cybersecurity Basics' mindset. You see the world differently—you see the layers, the locks, and the potential for bugs.

slides.title: What's Next? 🚀
slides.content:
### The Shield and the Sword

This is just the beginning. Continue your journey in the more advanced Cybron courses, like 'Mastering Kali' or 'Web Defense Deep-Dive'.

**Stay ethical, stay curious, and keep defending.**
